/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -stdlib=libc++ -O2 -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 14.0.0 -current_version 14.0.2 -o libarmadillo.14.0.2.dylib -install_name @rpath/libarmadillo.14.dylib CMakeFiles/armadillo.dir/src/wrapper1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/armadillo.dir/src/wrapper2.cpp.o  -framework Accelerate
